description: GitHub repositories and datasets relevant to Coordination Enhancing Video Games research

tier1_core_environments.name: google-deepmind/open_spiel
tier1_core_environments.description: OpenSpiel is a collection of environments and algorithms for research in general reinforcement learning and search/planning in games.
tier1_core_environments.relevance: HIGH - Comprehensive game theory library with implementations of coordination games, bargaining, signaling games, and more. Directly supports building and testing game-theoretic coordination mechanisms.

tier1_core_environments.name: Farama-Foundation/PettingZoo
tier1_core_environments.description: An API standard for multi-agent reinforcement learning environments, with popular reference environments and related utilities.
tier1_core_environments.relevance: HIGH - Standard API for multi-agent environments. Includes cooperative and competitive games. Ideal as an interface layer for our coordination game environments.

tier1_core_environments.name: google-deepmind/concordia
tier1_core_environments.description: A library for generative social simulation.
tier1_core_environments.relevance: HIGH - Generative agent-based social simulation using LLMs. Directly relevant to designing AI-mediated coordination scenarios. Used in NeurIPS 2024 Cooperative AI contest.

tier1_core_environments.name: HumanCompatibleAI/overcooked_ai
tier1_core_environments.description: A benchmark environment for fully cooperative human-AI performance.
tier1_core_environments.relevance: HIGH - Premier benchmark for human-AI cooperative coordination. Players must coordinate cooking tasks without explicit communication. Includes human gameplay data.

tier1_core_environments.name: google-deepmind/meltingpot
tier1_core_environments.description: A suite of test scenarios for multi-agent reinforcement learning.
tier1_core_environments.relevance: HIGH - Multi-agent test scenarios including cooperation, competition, and social dilemmas. Excellent for testing coordination strategies among strangers.

tier1_core_environments.name: google-deepmind/hanabi-learning-environment
tier1_core_environments.description: A research platform for Hanabi experiments.
tier1_core_environments.relevance: HIGH - Hanabi requires coordination through implicit communication (giving clues about others' cards). A canonical coordination game where players must develop shared conventions.

tier2_frameworks_and_tools.name: oTree-org/oTree
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.description: Python framework for multiplayer decision games, behavioral experiments, and surveys.
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.relevance: MEDIUM-HIGH - Platform for running behavioral economics experiments including coordination games. Can be used to deploy human experiments for our research.

tier2_frameworks_and_tools.name: Stanford-ILIAD/PantheonRL
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.description: A package for training and testing multi-agent reinforcement learning environments. Supports cross-play, fine-tuning, ad-hoc coordination.
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.relevance: MEDIUM-HIGH - Specifically supports ad-hoc coordination (coordinating with unseen partners), which is directly relevant to stranger coordination.

tier2_frameworks_and_tools.name: facebookresearch/translagent
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.description: Code for Emergent Translation in Multi-Agent Communication.
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.relevance: MEDIUM - Studies emergent language/communication in multi-agent settings. Relevant to understanding how coordination conventions emerge.

tier2_frameworks_and_tools.name: HumanCompatibleAI/overcooked-demo
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.description: Web application where humans can play Overcooked with AI agents.
tier2_frameworks_and_tools.relevance: MEDIUM - Web-based human-AI interaction demo. Useful reference for building our own web-based coordination games.

tier3_specialized.name: gdquest-demos/godot-procedural-generation
tier3_specialized.description: Procedural generation algorithms and demos for the Godot game engine.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Procedural generation techniques applicable to generating varied coordination game levels/scenarios.

tier3_specialized.name: JingyeChen/awesome-game-generation
tier3_specialized.description: Curated list of cutting-edge techniques in game generation including LLM-based approaches.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Comprehensive survey of game generation techniques. Useful reference for procedural generation of coordination scenarios.

tier3_specialized.name: travislacroix/demonstrator-game
tier3_specialized.description: Implementation of an agent-based model extending the Lewis-Skyrms Signaling game with Roth-Erev reinforcement learning.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Direct implementation of Lewis signaling games, a core theoretical framework for understanding convention formation.

tier3_specialized.name: maxb00/basic-signaling-games
tier3_specialized.description: Python implementations of Basic Signaling Games proposed by David Lewis.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Clean Python implementations of Lewis signaling games for reference.

tier3_specialized.name: dragon-bot-z/schelling-point
tier3_specialized.description: Schelling Point coordination game - find focal points through independent guessing.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Direct implementation of Schelling focal point games. Small but directly on-topic.

tier3_specialized.name: vermashresth/sequential_social_dilemma_games
tier3_specialized.description: Code-base for solving Sequential Social Dilemma Game using Multi-Agent RL, motivation and communication.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Sequential social dilemmas are extended coordination/cooperation problems relevant to game design.

tier3_specialized.name: liyang619/COLE-Platform
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Experimental platform for human-AI coordination studies in Overcooked.

tier3_specialized.name: Martin-Kugler/multi-action-coordination-game
tier3_specialized.description: Python engine for the Limited Sum Game, an iterated coordination dilemma. Features tournament simulations and evolutionary dynamics.
tier3_specialized.relevance: MEDIUM - Directly models coordination dilemmas with tournament simulations and DQN agents.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: Overcooked-AI Human Data
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: Human gameplay data collected via MTurk experiments where human pairs played Overcooked together. Includes trajectory data for training human-compatible AI agents.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: HIGH - Real human coordination behavior data in a cooperative game setting.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: MultiAgentBench
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: Benchmark for evaluating LLM-based multi-agent systems across collaboration and competition scenarios with milestone-based KPIs.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: HIGH - Modern benchmark for evaluating coordination quality in multi-agent LLM systems.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: ZSC-Eval (Zero-Shot Coordination Evaluation)
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: First evaluation toolkit and benchmark for zero-shot coordination algorithms - training agents to work with diverse, unseen partners.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: HIGH - Directly addresses the stranger coordination problem: coordinating without prior experience together.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: Concordia Contest Scenarios
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: NeurIPS 2024 contest scenarios for cooperative LLM agents in text-based social simulation environments.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: HIGH - Cooperative AI evaluation scenarios in rich social settings.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: Melting Pot Evaluation Scenarios
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: Suite of multi-agent test scenarios measuring cooperation, social dilemmas, and coordination in grid-world environments.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: HIGH - Standardized scenarios for evaluating coordination among agents.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: Focal Point Experiment Data (Mehta et al.)
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: Classic experimental data on focal points in pure coordination games. Multiple studies with 1000+ participants examining how people coordinate without communication.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: HIGH - Foundational data on Schelling focal points and human coordination heuristics.

datasets_and_benchmarks.name: oTree Experiment Templates
datasets_and_benchmarks.description: Library of standard game theory experiment templates including coordination games, public goods games, and trust games.
datasets_and_benchmarks.relevance: MEDIUM - Ready-made experiment templates for running human coordination studies.

key_papers_with_code.title: COMBO: Compositional World Models for Embodied Multi-Agent Cooperation
key_papers_with_code.relevance: Multi-agent cooperation in procedural game environments.

key_papers_with_code.title: Multi-Agent Coordination across Diverse Applications: A Survey
key_papers_with_code.relevance: Comprehensive 2025 survey of multi-agent coordination approaches.

key_papers_with_code.title: Procedural Content Generation in Games: A Survey with Insights on Emerging LLM Integration
key_papers_with_code.relevance: Survey on PCG including LLM-based approaches for game content generation.
